mapper.select: SELECT user_id, available, escrow, version FROM credit_balance WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE credit_balance SET available = available - #{amount}, escrow = escrow + #{amount}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE credit_balance SET escrow = escrow - #{amount}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE credit_balance SET escrow = escrow - #{amount}, available = available + #{amount}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}

INSERT INTO credit_balance(user_id, available, escrow, version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{amount}, 0, 0) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET available = credit_balance.available + EXCLUDED.available, version = credit_balance.version + 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO credit_ledger(user_id, delta, reason, ref_id, coeff_version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{delta}, #{reason}, #{refId}, 1)
